ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for petitioner Suzy Heil Chi

Mr. Der stated that the question he was seeking to have addressed was whether or not proceeds of the sale of the decedent's real property are community property or not. The Court responded that bringing a spousal property petition was not the appropriate tool to use where, as here, a probate has been opened. The petition is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)
